hooks.prompt: Run the memory-keeper agent (.claude/agents/memory-keeper.md). Read the session transcript and append a timestamped session block to docs/memory/<today>.md (create the file if missing). Record: decisions made, work completed, items closed, items changed, items deferred, new open items. Never edit prior days' notes. Edit directly — do not stage for approval. If the session was trivial (no commits, no decisions, no state changes), exit silently with no edits.
